title: Creamy Date Pasta
description: A unique Mexican-inspired dish, combining the sweetness of dates with a rich and creamy sauce.

ingredients.name: oozy cheese
ingredients.notes: such as mozzarella or Monterey Jack

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
Meanwhile, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped dates and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they are caramelized and fragrant.
Stir in the oozy cheese until melted and smooth.
Once the pasta is cooked, drain it and add it to the skillet with the date and cheese mixture.
Toss everything together until the pasta is well coated with the sauce.
Season with salt to taste, then garnish with chopped cilantro if desired.
